properties.value: Please upgrade  to version 7 or higher.  Older versions may use Math.random() in certain circumstances, which is known to be problematic.  See https://v8.dev/blog/math-random for details.

properties.value: This is a stub types definition. dotenv provides its own type definitions, so you do not need this installed.

properties.name: cdx:npm:deprecated
properties.value: core-js@<3.23.3 is no longer maintained and not recommended for usage due to the number of issues. Because of the V8 engine whims, feature detection in old core-js versions could cause a slowdown up to 100x even if nothing is polyfilled. Some versions have web compatibility issues. Please, upgrade your dependencies to the actual version of core-js.

properties.value: This SVGO version is no longer supported. Upgrade to v2.x.x.

properties.value: Modern JS already guarantees Array#sort() is a stable sort, so this library is deprecated. See the compatibility table on MDN: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Array/sort#browser_compatibility

properties.name: cdx:npm:deprecated
properties.value: The querystring API is considered Legacy. new code should use the URLSearchParams API instead.

properties.value: Chokidar 2 does not receive security updates since 2019. Upgrade to chokidar 3 with 15x fewer dependencies
